terms.title: Terms of Service, Privacy Policy, Cookie Policy, and AI Ethical Guidelines
terms.warning: VTEX CX Platform values your privacy. We've designed this privacy notice to guide you through the data we collect and how we use it. Please review the following policies, as your consent is required to continue using VTEX CX Platform.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.content:
1. ACCEPTANCE
This is a contract entered into between you and VTEX BRASIL TECNOLOGIA PARA E-COMMERCE LTDA, headquartered at Avenida Brigadeiro Faria Lima, 4.440, 10th floor, Vila Olímpia, in the city of São Paulo, state of São Paulo, ZIP code 04538-132, with company registration number 05.314.972/0001-74, herein represented by its legal representatives. All rights reserved.

These Terms of Use govern the use of VTEX CX Platform Flows, without prejudice to the application of current legislation. If you do not agree to these terms, do not use this platform.

You acknowledge that you have reviewed and accepted these Terms of Use. Please read them carefully, as use of this platform means that you have accepted all terms and agree to abide by them. If you are a minor or legally incapable in any respect, you will need permission from your parents or guardians, who must also agree to these Terms and Conditions.

BY USING VTEX CX Platform Flows, YOU AUTOMATICALLY AGREE TO THESE TERMS OF USE AND ACCEPT FULL RESPONSIBILITY FOR ALL ACTIONS TAKEN BY YOU IN VTEX CX Platform Flows OR IN RELATED SERVICES. YOU ALSO AGREE TO BE BOUND BY THE TERMS DESCRIBED IN OUR PRIVACY POLICY. TO ACCESS IT, CLICK HERE.

If you have questions or need to discuss any matter related to these Terms of Use, please contact us at support.weni@vtex.com.


2. DEFINITIONS
VTEX CX Platform Flows: It is a free, open-source framework designed to send and receive data using basic mobile phones, manage complex workflows, automate analysis, and present data in real time.

API: This acronym stands for Application Programming Interface. It is a set of routines and programming standards for accessing a software application or web-based platform.

USER: It is you, the company, Non-Governmental Organization, or Civil Association that has been invited to use VTEX CX Platform Flows through VTEX CX Platform and manages it, in accordance with the conditions established in these Terms, to create automated communication flows with your customers.

CLIENTS: The customers or recipients of the User, whether individuals or legal entities, who receive messages through VTEX CX Platform Flows.

CHANNELS: This is where the interaction between a person and the bot takes place. It occurs through the creation of the flow by you. Thus, it consists of the means by which messages are delivered to the customer. Through channel management, you can conduct campaigns and, therefore, collect data for the desired purposes. VTEX CX Platform Flows currently supports the WhatsApp channel.

MESSAGES: The data that travels through the channels.

FLOWS: The interactive ways to show how information is shared or how data is collected. Visual and intuitive flow creation allows you to precisely define which messages are exchanged with customers.

CAMPAIGNS: A tool within the platform that makes it possible for you to maintain continuous contact with customers, automating the frequency with which the system contacts them again to send new information, collect new data, or check whether a given situation has changed.

TRIGGERS: They enable the system to react to external stimuli and can determine how the system responds when receiving a text message through a channel.

ANALYTICS: The analytics portal of the platform, where it is possible to view information on the number of messages, categories, and users.

TRANSFER: A third-party platform that can be integrated via API with VTEX CX Platform Flows and allows you to send airtime credit to more than 400 operators in more than 100 countries. This requires a TransferTo account.

CREDIT: The number of messages made available to the customer. Each message sent or received is equivalent to one credit used.


3. SERVICE
VTEX CX Platform Flows is a platform that allows you to design, pilot, and easily scale services that connect directly with mobile customers.

Once you have created a Channel, you will be able to define campaigns for customer data collection through interactively designed and structured triggers and flows, generating stimuli and directing customer responses through SMS to obtain the information you need for the campaign. In addition, the platform allows analyzing the entire exchange of messages, categories, and users.

VTEX CX Platform Flows, as described in the definitions, consists of a UNICEF open-source platform. However, VTEX CX Platform hosts its code on its own servers, where all information collected by you is stored, in accordance with the privacy policy available at https://weni.ai/privacy-policy.


4. INSTRUCTIONS
From your own VTEX CX Platform Flows access account, using your unique and confidential login and password, you will have access to the platform homepage.

To get started, the first step is to add a channel, which consists of a phone number or social network account that VTEX CX Platform Flows can use to send and receive messages on your behalf. You can choose to use an Android phone and your own mobile plan, or we can connect you directly to a service provider in your country.

More information is available at: https://new.push.al/channels/channel/claim/.


5. AMENDMENTS, MODIFICATIONS, AND TERMINATION
VTEX CX Platform reserves the right, at any time, to modify these Terms to include, remove, or amend any of their provisions. Such modifications will take effect immediately. Upon posting such changes, by continuing to use the platform, you will have accepted and agreed to abide by the modified terms.

VTEX CX Platform may, at any time, suspend or terminate your access to the platform in the event of suspected fraud, unjust gain or advantage, or failure to comply with any conditions set forth in these Terms of Use, the Privacy Policy, or applicable law. In such cases, you will not be entitled to any compensation, and VTEX CX Platform Flows may bring the appropriate legal action, if necessary, as well as take any other measures necessary to pursue and safeguard its interests.


6. ACCESS VTEX CX Platform Flows
To access VTEX CX Platform Flows and use its features, you do not need any kind of registration.

To use VTEX CX Platform Flows, you must be at least 18 (eighteen) years old.


7. LIMITATIONS OF LIABILITY
You are solely responsible for the use of VTEX CX Platform Flows and must abide by the rules of these Terms of Use, as well as the laws applicable to VTEX CX Platform Flows.

In no event will VTEX CX Platform, its controller, affiliates, partners, or employees be liable for any direct or indirect damages resulting from or in connection with the access to, use of, or inability to access or use VTEX CX Platform Flows.

IN VIEW OF THE CHARACTERISTICS INHERENT TO THE INTERNET ENVIRONMENT, VTEX Agentic CX IS NOT RESPONSIBLE FOR CONNECTION INTERRUPTIONS OR SUSPENSIONS, INCOMPLETE OR FAILED COMPUTER TRANSMISSIONS, OR TECHNICAL FAILURES OF ANY KIND, INCLUDING, BUT NOT LIMITED TO, THE MALFUNCTION OF ANY NETWORK, HARDWARE, OR SOFTWARE. THE UNAVAILABILITY OF ACCESS TO THE INTERNET OR TO VTEX CX Platform Flows, AS WELL AS INCORRECT OR INCOMPLETE INFORMATION ABOUT VTEX CX Platform Flows AND ANY HUMAN, TECHNICAL, OR OTHER FAILURE IN THE PROCESSING OF VTEX Agentic CX Flows INFORMATION, SHALL NOT BE REGARDED AS VTEX CX Platform Flows' LIABILITY. VTEX CX Platform Flows DISCLAIMS ANY RESPONSIBILITY FOR SUCH FACTS AND/OR ACTS.

It is your responsibility to keep the environment of your device (computer, mobile phone, tablet, etc.) secure by using available tools, such as antivirus software, firewalls, among others, to help prevent electronic risks.

VTEX CX Platform Flows may contain links to third-party sites and applications. This does not imply, in any way, that VTEX CX Platform Flows endorses, verifies, warrants, or has any connection with the owners of such sites or applications, and it is not responsible for their content, accuracy, policies, practices, or opinions. VTEX CX Platform Flows recommends that you read the terms of use and privacy policies of each third-party site or service that you visit or use.


8. CONTENT AVAILABILITY
VTEX CX Platform may, at its sole discretion, allow you or any other user to submit, post, publish, or provide, in the application, content or text, audio, or video information ("User Content").

Any User Content that is defamatory, libelous, abusive, violent, pornographic, obscene, offensive, or unlawful, as determined by VTEX CX Platform, at its sole discretion, including proprietary information belonging to other persons or companies (e.g. copyright or trademarks) without the express permission of the owner of such rights, shall not be the responsibility of VTEX CX Platform.

Any User Content provided by you remains under your ownership.


9. LEGAL RESTRICTIONS
YOUR CONTENT: You are solely and exclusively responsible for the content of the texts made available in conversations, ensuring that such content does not violate and does not cause undue exposure or embarrassment to end users, and you are also responsible for your content in or out of court, fully exempting VTEX CX Platform from any joint or subsidiary liability for any Claims, given the intermediary nature of the service that VTEX CX Platform provides to you through the use of VTEX CX Platform Flows. You must also ensure that your Content, your submissions, and your use — and the use by end users — including your offers and services, do not violate any applicable Policies or Laws. You are fully responsible for the development, content, operation, maintenance, and use of your Content, submissions, offers, and services made available. You may not, under any circumstances, provide Content that: (a) is false or misleading, or offers Content other than the one with which the user will engage, attempting in any way to deceive, induce, and/or offend the law, morals, or commercial ethics; (b) invades the privacy of others or harms their image or honor in any way, or promotes any form of racism against minority groups, or preaches intolerance, prejudice, religious or political fanaticism, or discrimination against groups of people or ethnic groups, as well as contains obscene content, such as pedophilia and other crimes of a sexual nature, is in any way prohibited or not recommended for a given age group, or defends or promotes drugs and drug trafficking, narcotics, cigarettes, alcoholic beverages, or illegal games; and (c) Content that violates third-party rights, including but not limited to copyright, and/or the creation and dissemination of Content that you are not authorized to provide, as well as Illegal and/or pirated Content, infringing the copyrights and property rights of third parties.

YOUR CLIENT: The end users of the services and/or products offered by you through VTEX Agentic CX Flows have a unique and exclusive relationship with you; therefore, you are also responsible for the use of your Content and offers by your end-user clients. Therefore, you will exempt VTEX CX Platform and will be responsible for ensuring that all end users observe the applicable Policies and/or Laws. Furthermore, if you become aware of any breach of your obligations described in these Terms of Use caused by an end user of your account, you must immediately suspend access to your Content and to the offers and services provided, and VTEX CX Platform may temporarily suspend access to VTEX CX Platform Flows until the problem is resolved.


10. COMPLAINTS ABOUT COPYRIGHT INFRINGEMENT
Allegations of copyright infringement of any content available on VTEX CX Platform Flows should be sent by email to support.weni@vtex.com.


11. GENERAL INFORMATION
These Terms of Use are governed by the laws of the Federative Republic of Brazil. Any questions or situations not foreseen in these Terms of Use will first be resolved by VTEX CX Platform Flows and, if they persist, should be resolved by the Court of the District of Maceió/AL, to the exclusion of any other, however privileged it may be or may become.

If you have any questions, comments, or suggestions, please contact us by email at support.weni@vtex.com.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.content:
Introduction
The privacy policy of VTEX CX aims to detail how the organization handles the personal data of clients and employees, demonstrate the means used to ensure security and privacy in the handling of personal data, and define guidelines and responsibilities.

The VTEX CX policy is based on privacy best practices, recognized frameworks, and the organization’s values.

Personal Data Protection Legislation Terms

Personal Data
“Personal data” refers to information that identifies or can identify a natural person (individual). Personal data is typically provided to VTEX CX by the data subject or by third parties.

Personal data may, in exceptional cases, include information related to a particular sensitive condition of the data subject.

Sensitive Personal Data
“Sensitive personal data” includes data about racial or ethnic origin, religious beliefs, political opinions, union membership, or affiliation with religious, philosophical, or political organizations, as well as data related to health, sex life, genetic data, or biometric data, when linked to an individual (natural person).

Generally, VTEX CX does not collect or process sensitive personal data.

However, sensitive personal data may be entered by users or third parties on the VTEX CX Platform. For more details, refer to the Sensitive Personal Data section of this Privacy Policy.

Data Subject
The natural person to whom the processed personal data refers.

Personal Data Controller
The “Controller” is the individual or legal entity responsible for decisions regarding the processing of personal data.

Personal Data Processor
The “Processor” is the individual or legal entity that processes personal data on behalf of and in the interest of the Controller.

With regard to the processing of personal data on the VTEX CX platform by contracting companies, VTEX CX acts solely as a Data Processor.

Data Protection Officer (DPO)
The “Data Protection Officer” or DPO is the person appointed by the processing agent to act as a communication channel between the organization, data subjects, and the National Data Protection Authority (ANPD).

For VTEX CX contractual purposes, the DPO’s contact information is listed at the end of this document.

Scope of this Privacy Policy – Data Subjects
For the purposes of this Policy, data subjects include any individual who uses the VTEX CX Platform, has personal data associated with it, or falls under one or more of the following conditions:
  • Legal representative or proxy of a legal entity contracting the VTEX Agentic CX platform;
  • Any other identifiable or identified individual interested in the VTEX Agentic CX platform who visits the pages of the site weni.ai.
1. Personal Data Processing
VTEX CX processes personal data based on legal grounds related to the regular exercise of rights in a contract and on the consent of data subjects.

However, personal data may be collected, stored, and processed without the consent of the data subject in cases permitted by law, including:
  • Compliance with legal or regulatory obligations;
  • Shared data processing necessary for the implementation of public policies by the public administration, as provided by laws or regulations;
  • Conducting research studies by research organizations, ensuring the anonymization of sensitive personal data whenever possible;
  • Exercising rights in judicial, administrative, or arbitration proceedings;
  • Protecting the life or physical integrity of the data subject or of a third party;
  • Fraud prevention and user security in identity verification and authentication processes in electronic systems.
Upon first visiting the VTEX CX site, or whenever our Privacy Policy is updated, users will be prompted to consent to the collection and processing of their personal data.

Whenever necessary, consent may be requested again for specific actions or to further protect user data.

VTEX CX primarily processes personal data to provide its services and digital platform to its clients and users.

In addition to providing its digital platform, personal data may also be processed for purposes such as:
  • Communication between VTEX CX and the data subject;
  • Non-automated decision-making processes that take into account the legitimate interest of the data subject or VTEX CX in accordance with legal or regulatory parameters;
  • Compliance with data protection laws, regulations, and frameworks, as well as judicial or administrative requests from the Judiciary or relevant government agencies, such as the National Data Protection Authority (ANPD);
  • Protecting our operations, trade secrets, or proprietary information, and safeguarding against potential harm, including defending our business against credit fraud, under Article 7, item X of the General Data Protection Law (LGPD).
As previously noted, VTEX Agentic CX processes personal data for various purposes, all in compliance with the regulatory principles established under the LGPD, such as purpose, adequacy, and necessity.

2. Processing Sensitive Personal Data
As a rule, VTEX CX does not collect, process, or store sensitive personal data. However, on rare occasions, sensitive personal data may be collected and processed by VTEX CX upon the explicit request and demonstrated necessity of the contracting client.

In all cases, VTEX CX restricts access to sensitive personal data only to individuals directly involved in the platform’s maintenance and related systems or to those acting in VTEX CX's legitimate interest to fulfill regulatory or legal obligations or to exercise its rights as a data processing agent, always adopting best practices for personal data protection.

3. Sharing Personal Data with Third Parties
To ensure the proper functioning of its platform and services, VTEX CX may share personal data with third parties.

In any case, VTEX CX only shares personal data collected via its platforms with national and international companies that provide cloud hosting and messaging automation services and comply with best practices for data protection and information security.

4. Retention and Processing of Personal Data
VTEX CX ensures that appropriate processes are implemented to manage personal data and to remove, anonymize, or archive it when necessary.

Generally, VTEX CX stores personal data only to:
  • Comply with the purposes outlined in this Privacy Policy;
  • Meet our legal or regulatory obligations, as well as protect our rights under the law.
In any case, personal data subjects or their legal representatives may request the exercise of their rights under the General Data Protection Law.

5. Rights of Data Subjects Regarding Personal Data
The rights reserved for data subjects include:
  • The right to confirm the existence of personal data processing;
  • The right to access personal data processed or stored by us;
  • The right to correct incomplete, inaccurate, or outdated data;
  • The right to anonymize, block, or delete data deemed unnecessary or excessive, under applicable legislation;
  • The right to data portability upon explicit request, in line with the National Data Protection Authority’s resolution, while safeguarding our trade or industrial secrets;
  • The right to delete personal data processed based on consent, except in cases permitted by law under Article 16 of the LGPD;
  • The right to be informed about the public and private entities with which we share personal data for service delivery, within the scope defined by law and the National Data Protection Authority;
  • The right to be informed of the possibility of not providing consent and of the consequences of refusal;
  • The right to withdraw consent, as provided for in Law No. 13.709/2018 – General Data Protection Law.
Requests to exercise these rights should be made through: dpo{'@'}vtex.com.

Please note that VTEX CX reserves the legitimate right to deny the exercise of data subject rights in cases permitted by law, such as compliance with a legal obligation or credit protection.

6. Data Controller and Processor
VTEX CX will act as a Controller solely for personal data collected via its official website https://weni.ai/.

VTEX Agentic CX will act as a Processor when the processing of personal data involves client companies using the VTEX Agentic CX platform, which act as Data Controllers.

7. Personal Data Security
VTEX CX commits to adopting appropriate technical, physical, organizational, and legal measures consistent with national data protection laws to safeguard the personal data it processes.

To this end, VTEX CX uses certified cloud computing and hosting services to ensure maximum data security for users.

In the event of a security incident resulting in the destruction, loss, alteration, unauthorized access, or leakage of personal data, VTEX CX will promptly assess the risks to the rights of the data subjects.

Notification to data subjects and the NATIONAL DATA PROTECTION AUTHORITY (ANPD) will be made in accordance with Article 48 of the General Data Protection Law, following a risk assessment.

8. Privacy Policy Changes
Occasionally, there may be changes to our privacy policy during the provision of services.

If the VTEX CX privacy policy changes, users will be explicitly informed when they revisit the site or log in to the platform.

VTEX CX is responsible for providing the updated version of the policy to clients upon request.

Our Terms of Use and Privacy and Cookies Policies are updated in compliance with Law No. 13.709/2018 – General Data Protection Law.

9. When does this Privacy Policy not apply?
This Privacy Policy does not apply to any other solutions and/or services not provided by us.

Be sure to read the privacy policies of each third-party site or service you visit or use. VTEX CX is not responsible for any violation of data subject privacy rights by such sites.

10. International Data Transfer
The personal data collected may be transferred, stored, and processed in data centers located outside the data subject’s country of origin, as necessary to ensure the operation, security, and availability of our services. We currently use cloud infrastructure with data centers located in the following regions:

-> São Paulo, Brazil (sa-east-1)
-> Virginia, United States (us-east-1)
-> Mumbai, India (ap-south-1)
-> Ireland (eu-west-1)

These international transfers are carried out based on appropriate safeguards and in compliance with applicable data protection laws, including the Brazilian General Data Protection Law (LGPD – Law No. 13.709/2018).

The measures adopted include:

-> Specific contractual clauses that ensure the protection and confidentiality of the data;
-> Transfers only to countries that provide an adequate level of data protection or are based on valid legal mechanisms;
-> Internal policies and practices aligned with international standards for information security and privacy.

By using our services, you consent to and acknowledge that your data may be transferred to and processed in countries with different legal frameworks, but always with the appropriate protections as described in this Policy.

Contact the DPO
dpo{'@'}vtex.com

cookie.title: Cookie Policy
cookie.content:
Cookie policy for VTEX CX Platform Flows
This is the Cookie Policy for VTEX CX Platform Flows, available at https://new.push.al.


What are cookies
Cookies are small files that are downloaded to your computer to improve your experience while visiting certain websites. Here you will find information on what cookies collect on this website, how we use them, and why we sometimes need to store them. We will also explain how you can prevent these cookies from being stored. This may, however, impair or 'break' certain elements of the site's functionality.


How we use cookies
We use cookies for the reasons detailed below. Unfortunately, in most cases, there are no industry-standard options for disabling cookies without completely disabling the functionality and features they add to a website. It is recommended that you leave all cookies enabled if you are not sure whether you need them, as they may be required to provide services you use.


Disabling cookies
You can prevent cookies from being set by adjusting the settings in your browser (see your browser's Help section for instructions on how to do this). Note that disabling cookies will affect the functionality of this and many other websites that you visit. Disabling cookies will usually also disable certain functionality and features of this site. Therefore, it is recommended that you do not disable cookies.


The cookies we set
Cookies related to account and authentication:
  • When you create an account with us, cookies will be used to manage the signup process. These cookies are usually deleted when you log out. However, in some cases, they may remain afterward to remember your site preferences.
  • We use cookies so the website can remember that you are logged in. This prevents you from having to log in every single time you visit our site. These cookies are typically removed or cleared when you log out to ensure you can access restricted features and areas only when logged in.


Third-party cookies
In some cases, we also use cookies provided by trusted third parties. The following section details which third-party cookies you might encounter on this site.
  • From time to time, we test new features and make subtle changes to the way the site is delivered. While we are still testing new features, these cookies may be used to ensure that you receive a consistent experience while using the site. This helps us understand which optimizations our users appreciate the most.

ai_guidelines.title: AI Ethical Guidelines
ai_guidelines.content:
The purpose and mission of VTEX CX Platform are to unlock human potential by transforming communication through smart, open, and accessible technology. Above all, this means providing a safe environment for the expression and development of the full potential of every person who is part of VTEX CX Platform. We transform communication by developing tools that are increasingly capable of meeting the needs of our customers with quality. Our focus is to continue advancing this process so that these technologies become ever more robust, reliable, open, and accessible.

For our goals to be achieved, it is also important that our employees and customers are aligned with our values, culture, and principles. This applies to artificial intelligence research and development, product development, and all the services we offer, with the aim of unlocking human potential and creating an increasingly positive impact on the experience of our partners every day.

We have an exceptional team, and we encourage all VTEXers to recognize that. Putting goals into practice and pursuing them — our shared goals as well as the personal goals every individual — is part of who we are.
We believe in and value our indicators because they guide our actions. If VTEXers join us with a desire to learn and continue developing, that is the right mindset, because we know that great results lead to great learning.

We have a genuine interest in the success of our clients because our solutions are not designed as a closed box that they simply have to fit into. We always listen to our customers' challenges, context, and opportunities. In this way, we dream alongside them and create possibilities for impact through our technology.

We understand, believe in, and advocate for our technology and for who we are. We are always thinking and acting in ways that unlock human potential through technology. For us, working together goes beyond dialogue; collaboration is the act of creating, developing, and listening to what others have to say about your work and how you can improve it.

We value diversity and plurality on our team, we do our best to make everyone feel welcome, and we are proud of that. Do you know why? Because we understand that people with different backgrounds and experiences, whose perspectives complement one another, bring a broader view and, as a result, help us go further. This has everything to do with empathy. Although we share a common goal, we are different, and each of us has unique skills and much to contribute.

The world is changing right now, so we need to keep up with these transformations. We know that our team is amazing, and we are passionate about learning, sharing ideas, and exchanging updates, so we never stand still. We are always seeking new knowledge and positive experiences.

This is the foundation of all our values: we are passionate about results, and we work together to deliver service with excellence and quality because the customer is at the center of what we do. We are one, we are different, and we are nonconformists. That is why we work to ensure that our products create social impact and deliver value.

In our culture code, our values are essential, and producing technology for society is not just about developing a product that is smart, open, and accessible but also about creating value for society and generating social impact. Since the beginning of VTEX CX Platform, its core business has directly involved generating impact for millions of people. Several projects have affected people who gained access to our technology, helping to unlock human potential. When we talk about positive impact, we are referring not only to the external sphere but also to day-to-day work.

In many respects, ethics refers to the norms and rules we need to follow in order to live well in society — what we understand as normative ethics. In addition, it is important to emphasize that, for human potential to be fully unlocked, the necessary conditions must be guaranteed. Therefore, when we talk about the principles and conduct on which our entire existence and development are based, we are not only speaking about the norms and values we follow, but also about the virtues we encourage so that this potential can flourish.

According to the Aristotelian conception of ethics, which involves the pursuit of happiness, we encourage an environment in which our employees and customers seek to:
  • Respect the individuality of others and themselves
  • Care about the development of others
  • Be kind to their co-workers and customers
  • Draw on different opinions when making decisions
  • Have the courage not to remain silent in the face of human rights violations
  • Have the courage to confront their own prejudices
  • Use VTEX CX technologies to support their work
  • Use technology in moderation
  • Communicate with clients in a clear and proactive way
  • Have the courage to do what has never been done before
  • Seek to grow and become a reference in what they do


1. PRODUCT DEVELOPMENT

When we talk about developing a product, every stage matters to us — from conception and development to delivery. Our main mission in product development is to fulfill the company's Mission and Vision while giving users increasing autonomy.

It is very important to clarify that we do not use technology for technology's sake — it is a tool that helps us express our culture in order to generate value and social impact.

Our responsibility is to ensure that this product fulfills its role of helping organizations unlock human potential in an easy and accessible way.

It is through the product that VTEX CX achieves its mission. The product is what makes VTEX CX viable; without a product, there is no VTEX CX, and without VTEX CX, there is no product.

Our products must:
  • Always be aligned with our mission and values;
  • Seek excellence and quality;
  • Operate within our ethical principles;
  • Help organizations unlock human potential in an easy and accessible way;
  • Help organizations unlock human potential by generating value and positive impact.


2. ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE DEVELOPMENT

Artificial intelligence is the means, not the reason, for us to achieve the VTEX CX goal of unlocking human potential. We believe that without advanced technology and the use of artificial intelligence, we will not be able to reach that goal. At the same time, the development, research, and use of AI must also be aligned with our values.

VTEX CX Platform aims to reach and impact thousands of organizations and hundreds of millions of users through the development and use of artificial intelligence. For this reason, our main concern and responsibility when implementing artificial intelligence models is to ensure that they are accessible in both cost and use, useful, and consistent with VTEX CX's principles and values.

If we had the best model, but it was difficult to use and too expensive, we would not be achieving our goal. If we had an excellent model that was easy to use and financially accessible, but it had little applicability and was not useful, we still would not have achieved our objective. If we had everything else, but the AI did not align with VTEX CX's values, we still would not be meeting our goal.

Based on the application of our principles to artificial intelligence development, our models and AI development must:
  • Always be aligned with our mission and values;
  • Seek excellence and quality;
  • Operate within our ethical principles;
  • Help organizations unlock human potential in an easy and accessible way;
  • Help organizations unlock human potential by generating value and positive impact;
  • Be open and transparent;
  • Be fair, inclusive, and diverse;
  • Be reproducible;
  • Positively impact people


3. VTEX CX CODE OF CONDUCT
  • Unlock human potential through transparent, honest, loyal, and respectful conduct
  • Offer people dignity, freedom, and privacy
  • We do not tolerate any kind of harassment, discrimination, or prejudice
  • We protect and respect the data of our employees and customers
  • We develop products and services that have a positive impact and generate value for people and organizations
